experiment: retrospective controlled comparison from frozen inputs and recorded sessions
model_control: GLM-5.2 medium for text cases; Tchakarova multimodal work excluded as a capability confound

strategies.name: source-owned parallel direct writes
strategies.evidence: SWP collision; overlapping destinations; user-directed rollback and retry

strategies.name: fully sequential analysis and writing
strategies.evidence: SWP recovery completed without a second collision

strategies.name: parallel read-only extraction, one coordinator writer
strategies.evidence: separates safe read parallelism from serialized mutation; deterministic ownership tests pass

strategies.name: parallel exclusive-destination writers
strategies.evidence: War on the Rocks follow-up used destination-owned shared files without recorded rollback
strategies.tradeoff: requires complete reservations and coordinator-owned globals

reason: No fully concurrent strategy has evidence clearing every semantic and idempotence gate. Per experiment rule, choose parallel analysis with serialized writing.
exceptions: Allow strategy 4 only when manifests prove disjoint destinations and current pre-edit hashes.
Keep author concepts, indexes, rules, configuration, and log.md coordinator-owned.
Never compare image-dependent runs with text-only concurrency candidates.
